[{"title": "Digital Marketing Industry News (Updated Each Friday!)", "url": "https://ignitevisibility.com/digital-marketing-news/", "snippet": "[DDG Snippet] Although OpenAI is testing ads in ChatGPTandGoogle runs ads in AI ModeandAI Overviews within Search, Perplexity isn\u2019t the only platform to ...", "relevance_score": 0.6}, {"title": "State of AI: An Empirical 100 Trillion Token Study with", "url": "https://arxiv.org/html/2601.10088v1", "snippet": "[DDG Snippet] Our analysis is basedonmetadata collected from the OpenRouter platform, a unified AI inference layer that connects usersanddevelopers to hundreds ...", "relevance_score": 0.6}, {"title": "Artificial Intelligence Archives - Your Career Place", "url": "https://yourcareerplace.com/category/artificial-intelligence/", "snippet": "[DDG Snippet] ... questions into ready-to-run SQL, Python,andvisualization code, letting you at Your Career Place skip the tedious syntax wrestlingandfocusonthe ...", "relevance_score": 0.6}, {"title": "The Complete Guide to AI Search: How SGE and AI Overviews Are", "url": "https://pushleads.com/seo/ai-seo/complete-guide-ai-search/", "snippet": "[Jina Parallel Content] International expansion has followed a strategic pattern, with English-speaking markets and major economies receiving priority access. The European rollout in March 2025 came with additional restrictions\u2014AI Overviews are only available to signed-in users aged 18 and older, reflecting regulatory considerations around data privacy and AI transparency. This geographic variation in implementation creates opportunities for businesses operating in markets with limited AI Overview presence to gain early-mover advantages as these features expand. The financial implications are staggering. Voice commerce alone is projected to reach $151.39 billion in 2025, with 75% of local searches expected to be voice-based. Businesses that have successfully optimized for AI Overviews report conversion rates ranging from 3.76% to 5.53%, compared to traditional organic conversion rates of 1.19% to 3.7%. These aren\u2019t marginal improvements\u2014they represent fundamental shifts in customer acquisition economics that can determine market winners and losers. Understanding query triggering patterns provides crucial insights for optimization strategies. Informational queries dominate, accounting for 88.1% of all AI Overview triggers, while commercial queries have grown from 6.28% to 8.69% in recent months. The typical AI Overview query has lower search volume, with 60% showing fewer than 100 monthly searches, and 65% falling within the 21-60 keyword difficulty range. Perhaps most tellingly, 95% of queries triggering AI Overviews have no ads or extremely low cost-per-click values under $2, suggesting Google is protecting its advertising revenue while experimenting with AI integration. The industry-specific impact varies dramatically, creating both risks and opportunities. Healthcare organizations face the challenge of 87% AI Overview presence for their keywords, up from 72% just a year ago. Education has seen an even more dramatic shift, jumping from 18% to 87% AI Overview presence. B2B technology companies now see AI Overviews on 70% of their target keywords, while insurance has grown from 17% to 63%. Conversely, e-commerce has actually seen a decline from 29% to just 4% AI Overview presence, as Google appears to be protecting transactional queries that drive advertising revenue. ## How Google\u2019s AI brain processes your searches The integration of Google\u2019s Gemini models into search represents a quantum leap in query understanding that goes far beyond simple keyword matching. Gemini 2.5 Pro, now leading both WebDev Arena and LMArena leaderboards with an ELO score of 1415, processes information in ways that would have seemed like science fiction just years ago. With a one million-token context window, these models can analyze entire websites, understand complex relationships between concepts, and generate responses that demonstrate genuine reasoning rather than pattern matching. For those starting their journey in digital marketing, employing [four essential SEO strategies for beginne", "relevance_score": 0.85}, {"title": "State of AI 2025: 100T Token LLM Usage Study | OpenRouter", "url": "https://openrouter.ai/state-of-ai", "snippet": "[Jina Parallel Content] *   [Providers](https://openrouter.ai/providers) *   [Pricing](https://openrouter.ai/pricing) *   [Enterprise](https://openrouter.ai/enterprise) *   [Labs](https://openrouter.ai/labs) ### Company *   [About](https://openrouter.ai/about) *   [Announcements](https://openrouter.ai/announcements) *   [Careers Hiring](https://openrouter.ai/careers) *   [Privacy](https://openrouter.ai/privacy) *   [Terms of Service](https://openrouter.ai/terms) *   [Support](https://openrouter.ai/support) *   [State of AI](https://openrouter.ai/state-of-ai) *   [Works With OR](https://openrouter.ai/works-with-openrouter) *   [Data](https://openrouter.ai/data) ### Developer *   [Documentation](https://openrouter.ai/docs) *   [API Reference](https://openrouter.ai/docs/api-reference) *   [SDK](https://openrouter.ai/sdk) *   [Status](https://status.openrouter.ai/) ### Connect *   [Discord](https://discord.gg/fVyRaUDgxW) *   [GitHub](https://github.com/OpenRouterTeam) *   [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/104068329) *   [X](https://twitter.com/openrouter) *   [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@OpenRouterAI) ## Contents [PDF](https://openrouter.ai/assets/State-of-AI.pdf) *   [Introduction](https://openrouter.ai/state-of-ai#introduction) *   [Data and Methodology](https://openrouter.ai/state-of-ai#data-and-methodology) *   [Open vs. Closed Source Models](https://openrouter.ai/state-of-ai#open-vs_-closed-source-models) *   [The Rise of Agentic Inference](https://openrouter.ai/state-of-ai#the-rise-of-agentic-inference)\n...\n*   [Limitations](https://openrouter.ai/state-of-ai#limitations) *   [Conclusion](https://openrouter.ai/state-of-ai#conclusion) *   [References](https://openrouter.ai/state-of-ai#references) *   [Contributions](https://openrouter.ai/state-of-ai#contributions) *   [Appendix](https://openrouter.ai/state-of-ai#appendix) # State of AI An Empirical 100 Trillion Token Study with OpenRouter **Malika Aubakirova*****Alex Atallah**\u2020**Chris Clark**\u2020**Justin Summerville**\u2020**Anjney Midha*** * a16z (Andreessen Horowitz) \u2022\u2020 OpenRouter Inc. * Lead contributors. Please see _Contributions_ section for details. December, 2025 ## Abstract The past year has marked a turning point in the evolution and real-world use of large language models (LLMs). With the release of the first widely adopted reasoning model,_o1_, on December 5th, 2024, the field shifted from single-pass pattern generation to multi-step deliberation inference, accelerating deployment, experimentation, and new classes of applications. As this shift unfolded at a rapid pace, our empirical understanding of how these models have actually been used in practice has lagged behind. In this work, we leverage the OpenRouter platform, which is an AI inference provider across a wide variety of LLMs, to analyze over 100 trillion tokens of real-world LLM interactions across tasks, geographies, and time. In our empirical study, we observe substantial adoption of open-weight models, the outsized popularity of creative r", "relevance_score": 0.85}, {"title": "sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1008586/000149315220006930/form10-k.htm", "url": "https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1008586/000149315220006930/form10-k.htm", "snippet": "[Jina Parallel Content] The NASDAQ Stock Market, Inc.
